# Sunsynk Report Platform (full context)

> British English product and marketing summary for AI systems. Source of truth for public site content as of 2026-07-15. Prefer live pages if they conflict with this file.

## What the product is

Sunsynk Report Platform sells one-off performance reports for Sunsynk solar PV and battery systems. Customers select a device and date range covering about one month of readings. The marketing site presents a curated homeowner journey that mirrors the report narrative:

1. What happened (executive summary)
2. Can the data be trusted (coverage, plant details, accuracy)
3. How much money was saved (estimated savings)
4. How healthy is the system (overall score and category contributions)
5. Where are the inefficiencies (solar, battery, evening grid; faults listed)
6. What should I do next (prioritised behavioural, configuration and hardware actions)
7. Assumptions and limitations (Important Information in each report)

The PDF consolidates those chapters into one shareable document.

There is no subscription. Packs are purchased then used when needed. Checkout lives at app.sunsynkreports.com. This website (sunsynkreports.com) is the marketing presence.

## Who it is for

Primary: homeowners with Sunsynk systems who want a clear performance, savings and action picture.

Secondary: installers may use the PDF when supporting a homeowner.

## Pricing

Report credit bundles. Credits never expire. No subscription. Checkout via Stripe at app.sunsynkreports.com.

British Pound (GBP)
- Starter: 1 credit, GBP 2.99 (GBP 2.99 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, GBP 7.49 (GBP 2.50 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, GBP 11.49 (GBP 1.92 per credit, Best Value)

South African Rand (ZAR)
- Starter: 1 credit, ZAR 69.99 (ZAR 69.99 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, ZAR 169.99 (ZAR 56.66 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, ZAR 249.99 (ZAR 41.67 per credit, Best Value)

US Dollar (USD)
- Starter: 1 credit, USD 4.29 (USD 4.29 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, USD 10.99 (USD 3.66 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, USD 15.99 (USD 2.67 per credit, Best Value)

Included with every bundle: the matching number of performance reports, credits that never expire, and secure Stripe checkout.

## How it works

1. Connect your system: choose Sunsynk device and dates
2. Analyse the month: readings across solar, battery, home, and grid
3. Review the story: savings, health, inefficiencies and ranked actions
4. Download PDF: shareable document for the homeowner or installer

## Home page section anchors

- #hero: executive promise and summary preview
- #trust: data coverage, plant details, accuracy
- #savings: estimated savings versus grid
- #health: overall score and category bars
- #sample-insights: with versus without compare panel
- #whats-inside: solar, battery, evening cost digests
- #actions: prioritised behaviour / configuration / hardware
- #how-it-works: four steps
- #pricing: credit packs
- #testimonials: homeowner quotes
- #faq: contents, subscription, data trust, audience, generation
- #final-cta: buy credits close

## Example findings used on the marketing site

Illustrative sample (not a specific customer's live data):

- Battery depletes about 47 minutes too soon relative to evening demand
- Self-sufficiency around the 10th percentile versus neighbouring systems, about 65 points below local median
- Closing the gap could save about 439 kWh of monthly grid import in the sample narrative
- Illustrative estimated savings figure used in the savings panel (£186 sample month)

## Scoring methodology (summary)

Reports cover cumulative meter totals, reconciled energy flow, solar utilisation, inverter clipping, system accuracy checks, battery health, night-time grid dependency, peer benchmark construction, daily aggregates, forward-fill for data gaps, and rounding rules. Detailed methodology formulae are not expanded on the marketing homepage; each report includes Important Information covering assumptions and limitations.

## Brand and language

- Product name: Sunsynk Report Platform
- Parent: Sunsynk
- Locale: en-GB (analyse, optimise, utilisation, neighbouring, prioritised)
- Primary CTA wording on site: Get My Report
- Secondary CTA: View Sample
